visual_description: A bald, pale-skinned figure in a dark robe stands with his back to the camera, gazing at a swirling mass of fire or magical energy. The scene cuts to a young man with round glasses and a brown jacket looking downward with a concerned expression. He then turns and walks away through a crowd of people in dark clothing.
